chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1707 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7506/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition was filed for declaring impugned notification dated 21.11.2019 as null and void ab initio, whereby petitioner was transferred from the post of Principal, Government Sachal Sarmast Degree College, Ranipur and posted as Associate Professor in the same institute. It appears that this petition has not been taken up before this Court after 03.12.2019. Today, Regional Director (Colleges), Sukkur Region has filed a statement along with certain documents stating therein that petitioner was restored to his previous position i.e. Principal, Government Sachal Sarmast Degree College, Ranipur vide notification dated 06.03.2020, and later on, he expired on 15.04.2020. Such obituary dated 05.08.2020 has also been issued by College Education Department, Government of Sindh in light of his Death Registration Certificate issued on 27.04.2020. In view of above facts, learned Counsel for petitioner does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
